emails.subject: Re: Fin. metals launch newsticker
emails.body: Re: Fin. metals launch newsticker I'm not sure who Diana is do you know if someone has been in contact with the COMEX and has received their permission? David Forster@ENRON 07/21/2000 07:49 AM

emails.body: I don't know if we have spoken to Comex, but Edmund says "We have completed the due diligence on this" Dave From: Mark Taylor@ECT on 07/21/2000 09:39 AM
